titleStmt.title: SII 15.29: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 29. (B.K. No. 63 of 1927-28.) CHIKKAVAḌAVAṬṬI, MUNDARAGI PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall of the Kalamēśvara temple.

This is dated the cyclic year Krōdhana, Vaiśākha śu. 1[5], Sunday. The cyclic year cited coincided with the 8th regnal year of the king and in the said year there were two Vaiśākhas. As the given tithi fits in with Adhika Vaiśākha, the date may be equated to 1145 A.D., April 8, f.d.t. °32.
The epigraph registers a gift of land made by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Hollarasa for the worship and offerings of the god Kalidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalla krōdhana saṁvatarada vaisa(śā)kha suddha 15 na yādivāradaṁdu śrī ma
hāmaṁḍā(ḍa)ḷēsvara hollarasaru samastaparigrahaṁ dharmma pra kalidēvargga nna(snā)na bhō
ga nivēdyakke hiriya keṟeya kōḍiyiṁ teṁkalu taklilu mattaru Oṁdu 1 .
Digital edition of SII 15.29 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
